packages.name: math_extra
packages.description: Extended math: factorial, combinations, statistics, primes
packages.readme:
# math_extra

Extended math functions for Omnikarai.

## Install

```
omnip install math_extra
```

## Usage

```omnikarai
use math_extra
print factorial(10)
print is_prime(97)
print combinations(10, 3)
```

## Functions

- `factorial(n)` — returns n!
- `is_prime(n)` — returns bool
- `combinations(n, r)` — returns nCr
- `mean(list)`, `median(list)`, `stdev(list)`
packages.changelog:
## 1.0.0
- Initial release
- factorial, combinations, statistics, primes

packages.name: stringx
packages.description: Extended string manipulation: reverse, pad, repeat, title_case, snake_case
packages.readme:
# stringx

Powerful string manipulation for Omnikarai.

## Install

```
omnip install stringx
```

## Functions

- `reverse(s)` — reverse a string
- `pad_left(s, n, ch)` — pad to length n
- `title_case(s)` — Title Case
- `snake_case(s)` — snake_case
- `repeat(s, n)` — repeat string n times
- `trim(s)`, `ltrim(s)`, `rtrim(s)`

packages.name: vectors
packages.description: 2D/3D vector math: dot, cross, normalize, lerp, length
packages.readme:
# vectors

2D and 3D vector math for Omnikarai.

## Install

```
omnip install vectors
```

## Usage

```omnikarai
use vectors
let v1 = vec3(1.0, 2.0, 3.0)
let v2 = vec3(4.0, 5.0, 6.0)
print dot(v1, v2)
print normalize(v1)
```
packages.changelog:
## 0.9.0
- Beta release
- dot, cross, normalize, lerp, length

packages.name: collections
packages.description: Stack, Queue, LinkedList, HashMap implementations for Omnikarai
packages.readme:
# collections

Data structure implementations for Omnikarai.

## Install

```
omnip install collections
```

## Includes

- `Stack` — push, pop, peek, size
- `Queue` — enqueue, dequeue, front
- `LinkedList` — append, prepend, remove, find
- `HashMap` — set, get, has, delete, keys
packages.changelog:
## 1.0.0
- Initial release: Stack, Queue, LinkedList, HashMap

packages.name: json_parse
packages.description: Lightweight JSON parser and serializer for Omnikarai
packages.readme:
# json_parse

JSON parsing and serialization for Omnikarai.

## Install

```
omnip install json_parse
```

## Usage

```omnikarai
use json_parse
let obj = json_parse.parse('{"name":"test","val":42}')
print obj.name
print json_parse.stringify(obj)
```

packages.name: http_client
packages.description: Simple HTTP/HTTPS client — GET, POST, headers, timeouts
packages.readme:
# http_client

HTTP/HTTPS client for Omnikarai using WinHTTP.

## Install

```
omnip install http_client
```

## Usage

```omnikarai
use http_client
let resp = http_client.get("https://api.example.com/data")
print resp.status
print resp.body
```
packages.changelog:
## 1.1.0
- POST support, custom headers
## 1.0.0
- Initial GET support

packages.name: crypto_core
packages.readme:
# crypto_core

Cryptography primitives for Omnikarai.

## Install

```
omnip install crypto_core
```

## Functions

- `sha256(data)` — returns hex string
- `md5(data)` — returns hex string
- `base64_encode(data)`, `base64_decode(b64)`
- `aes128_encrypt(data, key)`, `aes128_decrypt(cipher, key)`

packages.name: regex_lite
packages.description: Lightweight regex engine for pattern matching in Omnikarai
packages.readme:
# regex_lite

Lightweight regex engine for Omnikarai.

## Install

```
omnip install regex_lite
```

## Usage

```omnikarai
use regex_lite
let m = regex_lite.match("hello world", "(\\w+)\\s(\\w+)")
print m.groups[0]
```
